# iOS App Guide — pay-once iPhone apps, tools, answers, and comparisons

> Structured discovery file for AI assistants and search crawlers. The site covers independent iOS apps, privacy-first/pay-once alternatives, free browser tools, and direct answer pages.

## Core app guides
- [Snapport](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/snapport.html): Make your own at home in 30 seconds
- [Sono Note](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/sononote.html): Just talk — get clean notes, a summary & to-dos
- [CV Desk](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/cvdesk.html): Instant ATS score + recruiter-ready templates
- [PicClear](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/picclear.html): Find duplicates & huge videos in one scan
- [ScanTo Pro](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/scanto.html): Scan, OCR-search & Face ID-lock docs — pay once
- [Cyca](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/cyca.html): See every phase, your best days & gentle days
- [G+Money](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/gmoney.html): Convert + log every expense in one tap — offline
- [HoursTag](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/hourstag.html): See what everything really costs — in hours of your life
- [LockHour Pro](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/lockhour.html): Block the apps that steal your focus — one tap
- [Unblurry](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/unblurry.html): AI super-resolution makes it crisp — on your iPhone
- [PhotoCream](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/photocream.html): 100+ real film looks, grain, halation & light leaks
- [Lumi Letters](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/lumiletters.html): Playful phonics, tracing & letter games
- [Lumi Math Planet](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/lumimath.html): A whole galaxy of number adventures
- [Lumi Mission Planet](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/lumimission.html): A daily habit & bedtime ritual kids love
- [Lumi Weather](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/lumiweather.html): Weather + a kid-outing score, tuned to their age
- [Lumi Letters Pro](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/lumiletterspro.html): The complete phonics, tracing & word-building world
- [Lumi Math Pro](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/lumimathpro.html): The whole number galaxy — every adventure unlocked
- [Lumi Mission Planet Pro](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/lumimissionpro.html): Habits, chores & bedtime kids actually want to do
- [Lumi Bopomofo](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/lumibopomofo.html): Zhuyin phonics, tracing & tone games — the first step to reading Chinese
- [Lumi Bopomofo Pro](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/lumibopomofopro.html): The complete Zhuyin (Bopomofo) world — every sound & game unlocked
- [Zodira](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/en-US/zodira.html): AI astrology, tarot, horoscope, BaZi & Zi Wei — offline and private

## Free tools
- [ATS Resume Checker — Free Keyword Match Score](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/tools/ats-resume-keyword-checker.html): Paste a job description and resume to check ATS keyword coverage, missing skills, and practical resume fixes entirely in your browser.
- [Free Birth Chart Calculator: Sun, Moon & Rising Signs](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/tools/birth-chart-calculator.html): Calculate an approximate natal chart with Sun, Moon and Rising signs from birth date, time and place. Free, private, mobile-friendly.
- [Hours of Work to Buy Calculator — Price to Work Time](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/tools/hours-of-work-calculator.html): Convert any price into hours and workdays using your hourly wage. Free mindful spending calculator.
- [Image to PDF iPhone — Free Private Offline Converter](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/tools/image-to-pdf-iphone.html): Convert iPhone photos or document images to a downloadable PDF in your browser, plus a private scanner checklist for offline OCR apps.
- [Passport Photo Size Guide by Country — Free ID Photo Checklist](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/tools/passport-photo-size-guide.html): Find passport and ID photo dimensions, 300 DPI pixel sizes, background rules and a checklist by country.
- [Period & Ovulation Calculator — Fertile Window Estimator](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/tools/period-ovulation-calculator.html): Calculate your estimated next period, ovulation date and fertile window from last period and cycle length.
- [Printable Practice Generator for Kids — Zhuyin, ABC, Numbers](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/tools/printable-practice-generator.html): Create free printable practice sheets for Zhuyin/Bopomofo, ABC phonics and numbers. Mobile-friendly and printable.
- [Screen Time Calculator — Hours, Days & Focus Cost](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/tools/screen-time-calculator.html): Calculate how many hours and days per year you spend on your phone or an app, with focus-blocking tips for iPhone.
- [Zodiac Compatibility Checker — Free Love Match Tool](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/tools/zodiac-compatibility-checker.html): Check zodiac sign compatibility for love and relationships. Free Sun-sign match score with strengths and growth tips.

## High-intent answers
- [app blocker iphone: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/app-blocker-iphone-for-deep-work.html): Need an app blocker iPhone setup for deep work? Compare Screen Time, focus timers, blocking friction, and LockHour Pro.
- [app to check my resume ats score: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/app-to-check-my-resume-ats-score-on-iphone.html): Need an app to check my resume ATS score on iPhone? Learn what ATS checks can and cannot do, and when CV Desk helps.
- [app to make id photos with correct size: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/app-to-make-id-photos-with-correct-size.html): Need an app to make ID photos with correct size? Use this checklist for passport, visa, school, employee, and government ID photos on iPhone.
- [ATS friendly resume template app: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/ats-friendly-resume-template-for-google-docs-and-word.html): Need an ATS friendly resume template app? Learn what works in Google Docs, Word, and iPhone resume builders before exporting.
- [best offline document scanner app for iphone: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/best-offline-document-scanner-app-for-iphone.html): Best offline document scanner app for iPhone: what to look for in OCR, searchable PDFs, privacy, Face ID lock, and no-subscription pricing.
- [bopomofo tracing app for kids: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/bopomofo-tracing-app-for-kids.html): Best bopomofo tracing app for kids: how to choose Zhuyin practice that is playful, no-ads, and useful for early Chinese reading.
- [CamScanner alternative no subscription: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/camscanner-alternative-without-subscription.html): Searching for a CamScanner alternative no subscription? Use this neutral checklist for OCR, searchable PDFs, privacy, and pay-once iPhone scanning.
- [Flo alternative private: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/flo-alternative-private-period-tracker.html): Searching for a Flo alternative private period tracker? Use this checklist for privacy, no ads, on-device tracking, and honest cycle predictions.
- [Freedom alternative iPhone: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/freedom-alternative-for-iphone-no-subscription.html): Searching for a Freedom alternative iPhone app? Compare blocking style, pricing, schedules, and when LockHour Pro is a no-subscription fit.
- [block distracting apps iphone: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/how-to-block-social-media-while-working-iphone.html): How to block distracting apps iPhone users open while working: a practical setup for social media, deep work, and LockHour Pro.
- [how to make a visa photo with my iphone: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/how-to-make-a-visa-photo-with-iphone.html): How to make a visa photo with my iPhone: sizes, photo rules, checklist, and when an app like Snapport can help you prepare a private on-device image.
- [Mandarin app for kids with zhuyin: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/mandarin-app-for-kids-with-zhuyin.html): Looking for a Mandarin app for kids with Zhuyin? Compare Bopomofo, tones, tracing, no ads, and Lumi Bopomofo.
- [ocr scanner app no subscription: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/ocr-scanner-app-no-subscription.html): Need an OCR scanner app no subscription? Compare searchable PDF features, offline OCR, export control, and why ScanTo Pro may fit.
- [offline period tracker: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/offline-period-tracker-no-account.html): Need an offline period tracker? Learn what to check for no-account use, privacy, cycle predictions, and when Cyca fits on iPhone.
- [passport photo app without subscription: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/passport-photo-app-without-subscription.html): Looking for a passport photo app without subscription? Learn what to check before paying and whether Snapport fits your iPhone document-photo workflow.
- [period tracker that doesn't sell data: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/period-tracker-that-doesnt-sell-data.html): Looking for a period tracker that doesn’t sell data? Learn privacy criteria, offline/on-device tradeoffs, and when Cyca is a good fit.
- [private period tracker app: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/private-period-tracker-after-roe-data-concerns.html): Choosing a private period tracker app after data concerns? A practical guide to privacy labels, local tracking, deletion, and Cyca.
- [resume builder no watermark free export: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/resume-builder-with-no-watermark-export.html): Looking for a resume builder no watermark free export? Compare exports, ATS formatting, ownership, and why CV Desk may be a strong iPhone choice.
- [scan receipts to searchable pdf iphone: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/scan-receipts-to-searchable-pdf-iphone.html): How to scan receipts to searchable PDF on iPhone, including OCR checks, export tips, tax organization, and a private ScanTo Pro workflow.
- [screen time not working: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/screen-time-not-working-iphone-alternative.html): Screen Time not working on iPhone? Try these checks first, then compare when a dedicated focus app like LockHour Pro makes sense.
- [Zety alternative no subscription: honest iPhone app buying guide](https://alice51849.github.io/ios-app-guide/answers/zety-alternative-no-subscription.html): Searching for a Zety alternative no subscription? Compare resume-builder pricing, no-watermark export, ATS checks, and CV Desk on iPhone.
